rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies the defect at src/be_vm.c:743, where the FLIP opcode uses arithmetic negation instead of bitwise complement.
rationale.local_fix: The suggested code change matches the developer patch, changing -a->v.i to ~a->v.i at the correct site.
rationale.global_fix: The response explains the underlying cause as a copy-paste error and suggests a macro to prevent similar mistakes, demonstrating understanding of the root cause.
